decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id (project_nostrand-rogers-sbs) already matches the registry record of the same ID. The registry card for project_nostrand-rogers-sbs has the same project name ('Nostrand Ave / Rogers Ave Select Bus Service'), same project_type ('Select Bus Service'), same borough (Brooklyn), same source (2011_03_07_brt_nostrand_cb3), and same description of converting B44 Limited to SBS. The observation already resolves to this registry record, so no link to a different record is needed.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Nostrand Ave/Rogers Ave Select Bus Service Community Board 3
B44 Limited will become SBS; B44 Local will continue as before. SBS buses will have the same fare as the locals.
